title: Beehiiv vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
intro: Beehiiv and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth tools, while Sendinblue excels at transactional email, SMS, and comprehensive CRM functionality. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right platform for your specific needs.
choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher looking to monetize content through ads and sponsorships
You want built-in referral programs and web reader functionality for audience growth
You prefer a platform designed specifically for independent media operators and writers
choose_b_if: You need comprehensive transactional email and SMS marketing capabilities
You require WhatsApp integration, built-in CRM, and chat features for customer communication
You want a generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers and lower entry price ($25/month)

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers seeking monetization features, while Sendinblue is superior for businesses needing transactional email, SMS, and CRM tools. Sendinblue offers better value for most businesses due to its broader feature set and larger free tier.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is more affordable, starting at $25/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. Additionally, Sendinblue's free tier accommodates 100,000 subscribers versus Beehiiv's 2,500, making it significantly cheaper for growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber lists and campaigns between platforms. Both tools support CSV exports and imports, though you may need to manually reconfigure segments, automation workflows, and design templates during the transition.
